home.title: Operations dashboard
home.content: Manage animals, health, activities and finances from one platform.

dashboards.rancherSubtitle: Overview of your herd, health alerts, finances and upcoming activities.
dashboards.veterinarianSubtitle: Professional view of clients, patients, health care records and follow-ups.

about.title: About AniTec
about.content: AniTec is a web application for small and medium ranchers, veterinarians and rural teams that need traceability, health alerts and better production decisions.

common.backendConnectionError: Could not connect to the backend.

iam.heroSubtitle: Sign in as a rancher or veterinarian to see an experience adapted to your responsibilities.

animals.title: Animals
animals.formSubtitle: Complete the basic record to identify the animal inside its farm or herd.
animals.name: Name
animals.saveError: The animal could not be saved. Check the entered data.
animals.notFound: No animals were found with that search.

herds.title: Farms
herds.subtitle: Manage your farms, herds or livestock units.
herds.formSubtitle: Register the farm to separate animals, health activities and analytics by location.
herds.name: Name
herds.saveError: The farm could not be saved. Check the entered data.

health.title: Health management
health.formSubtitle: Document symptoms, diagnosis, treatment and health follow-up for the animal.
health.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete this health event?
health.saveError: The health record could not be saved. Check the entered data.

veterinary.clientsSubtitle: Manage ranches and producers under your health supervision.
veterinary.patientsSubtitle: Review active patients and access their clinical history.
veterinary.clinicalHistorySubtitle: Complete health record for the selected animal.
veterinary.addClientSubtitle: Search registered ranchers and add them to your portfolio to access their production and health data.
veterinary.searchRancherPlaceholder: Search by rancher name or farm
veterinary.noRanchersFound: No ranchers were found with that criteria.
veterinary.noAssignedClients: You have no assigned rancher clients.

finance.title: Financial management
finance.formSubtitle: Record income or expenses to keep the production balance updated.
finance.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete this transaction?
finance.saveError: The financial transaction could not be saved. Check the entered data.

activities.title: Calendar and activities
activities.formSubtitle: Schedule activities, visits, production checks or important reminders.
activities.saveError: The activity could not be saved. Check the entered data.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Overview of herd, health and productivity.

iot.title: IoT devices
iot.subtitle: Basic readings from sensors linked to farms or livestock animals.
iot.formSubtitle: Register the device and assign it to a farm or livestock animal.

subscriptions.title: Plans and payments
